identity.name: AI Sensitive-Data Classification — PII/PHI/PCI In Training Sets (T1530)
identity.summary: Cortex Cloud DSPM + AI-SPM cross-scan classifies a planted training-data S3 bucket, flags at least three regulated data classes (PII, PHI, PCI) from SSN / credit-card / medical-record-number canaries, traces data lineage from bucket to the SageMaker training job, and raises governance violation AI-GOV-001. The scenario validates the data-class count, the lineage edge, and the governance violati…
identity.description: Regulated data leaking into AI training sets is the headline risk for finance, healthcare, and insurance POVs: a model trained on un-scoped PII/PHI/PCI inherits compliance obligations and can be coaxed to regurgitate that data. AI Security Posture Management answers it by cross-scanning data stores with DSPM and linking the regulated data to the AI workloads that consume it. This scenario plants a training-data bucket seeded with canary patterns — SSN 000-00-000X, credit-card 4111-1111-1111-111X, and medical-record-number MRN-CORTEXSIM-00X — and validates that Cortex Cloud detects at least three distinct regulated data classes, traces the lineage edge from the bucket to the SageMaker training-job manifest, and raises governance violation AI-GOV-001 (regulated_data_in_training_set), all within 900 seconds. Detection is posture-oriented: validation queries assert the data-class count from DSPM findings, the AI data-lineage edge from inventory, and the governance violation by finding_type. A correlation rule fuses the three signals into one AI data-governance incident.

data_sources: Cloud Storage: Cloud Storage Object Content

execution.framework_reference_id: SIM-AISPM-005 — Cortex Cloud DSPM + AI-SPM cross-scan + sensitive-data/lineage/governance probe

prerequisites.description: Cortex Cloud DSPM and AI-SPM enabled against the target AWS account.
ai-spm IaC module applied so the training-data bucket with PII/PHI/PCI canaries is planted.

payload.code:
# Posture validation — probe DSPM sensitive-data classes + AI lineage + AI-GOV-001.
curl -fsSL -H "Authorization: Bearer ${CORTEX_CLOUD_API_TOKEN}" "${CORTEX_CLOUD_API_BASE}/dspm/data_stores?name=aispm-training-data" | jq '[.data_stores[0].sensitive_data_classes[]?] | length'

expected_artifacts.description: Training-data bucket flagged with PII / PHI / PCI data classes.
AI data-lineage edge from bucket to SageMaker training job.
AI-GOV-001 governance violation (regulated data in training set).

xql_queries.name: AISPM-005 MTTD Anchor And Canary Verify Bookkeeping
xql_queries.query:
dataset = cloud_audit_logs
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter cloud_provider = "AWS" and resource_type = "s3_object"
| filter resource_name contains "aispm-training-data"
| fields _time, operation_name, resource_name

xql_queries.name: AISPM-005 DSPM AISPM Cross Scan Links Bucket To AI
xql_queries.query:
dataset = ai_spm_findings
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter finding_type = "data_lineage_linked"
| filter data_classification in ("PII", "PHI", "PCI")
| comp count() as linked by data_classification
| fields data_classification, linked

xql_queries.name: AISPM-005 DSPM Three Regulated Data Classes In Training Bucket
xql_queries.query:
dataset = cortex_cloud_posture
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter finding_type = "sensitive_data_class" and asset_type = "ai_data_store"
| filter data_classification in ("PII", "PHI", "PCI") and asset_id contains "aispm-training-data"
| comp count_distinct(data_classification) as class_count
| filter class_count >= 3
| fields class_count

xql_queries.name: AISPM-005 Data Lineage Edge Bucket To Training Job
xql_queries.query:
dataset = cortex_cloud_posture
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter asset_type = "ai_data_lineage_edge"
| filter asset_id contains "aispm-training-data" and target_asset_type = "ai_training_job"
| comp count() as lineage_edges
| filter lineage_edges >= 1
| fields lineage_edges

xql_queries.name: AISPM-005 Governance Violation Regulated Data In Training Set
xql_queries.query:
dataset = cortex_cloud_posture
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter finding_type = "AI-GOV-001" and tags contains "CortexSimAISPMFinding"
| comp count() as violations
| filter violations >= 1
| fields violations

correlation_rules.name: AI Data Governance — Regulated Data In Training Set With Lineage
correlation_rules.logic: XQL(AISPM-005 DSPM Three Regulated Data Classes In Training Bucket) AND XQL(AISPM-005 Data Lineage Edge Bucket To Training Job) AND XQL(AISPM-005 Governance Violation Regulated Data In Training Set)

analytics_modules: Cortex Cloud DSPM — Regulated-data classification of AI training stores
Cortex Cloud AI-SPM — Data lineage and AI governance violation detection

products.evidence_query: dataset = cortex_cloud_posture | filter finding_type = "sensitive_data_class" | fields _time, asset_id, data_classification, severity
dataset = cortex_cloud_posture | filter finding_type = "AI-GOV-001" | fields _time, asset_id, data_classification, severity
Correlation CR-AISPM-0005 fuses regulated-data classification, AI lineage edge, and AI-GOV-001 into one data-governance incident.

use_cases.name: AI Sensitive-Data Classification
use_cases.description: Classify regulated data in AI training stores, trace lineage to models, and raise governance violations.

test_cases.objective: Three regulated data classes, a lineage edge, and AI-GOV-001 surface within 900s.
preconditions: ai-spm training-data fixture with PII/PHI/PCI canaries applied.
steps: Observe DSPM classes, lineage, and governance violation in Cortex Cloud.
success_criteria: Lineage and AI-GOV-001 queries each return >= 1 row.
Correlation CR-AISPM-0005 raises one data-governance incident.

preventive_controls: Scrub or tokenize regulated data before it enters AI training stores.
Apply DSPM policy guardrails that block training jobs sourcing un-scoped PII/PHI/PCI.
Maintain explicit data-lineage records for every training set.
detection_engineering: Alert when a training store is classified with PII/PHI/PCI.
Trace lineage from regulated data stores to training jobs and models.
Raise a governance violation whenever regulated data reaches a training set.

references.title: Unit42 — Regulated Data Leakage in AI Training Pipelines
MITRE ATT&CK T1530 — Data from Cloud Storage Object

changelog.author: Henry Reed
changelog.change: Authored real DSPM + AI-SPM data-governance XQL against cortex_cloud_posture / ai_spm_findings, added correlation CR-AISPM-0005, enriched identity + panw_mapping. Promoted to active.
